description: Navy blue floral printed bag with brown synthetic leather detailingOne main zippered compartmentTwo shaped bellow pockets in front with a zippered pocket on the left one and red cross stitch detail on the one on the rightBeige cording and patch detailsSynthetic lining with two zippered compartments and mobile slot (brand patch inside)Zippered pocket at the back with brand patchTwo short handles and one long detachable,adjustable strap for carrying ease
